name: Asperges a La Vinaigrette (Asparagus Vinaigrette)
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch fresh asparagus, steamed or boiled
1 bottle good quality salad oil or olive oil
1 bottle wine vinegar, red, white or champagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooled asparagus on a platter.
2. At the table, pour about 2 tablespoons of oil and 1 tablespoon of vinegar onto each plate.
3. Use a fork to gently tilt the plate toward you and transfer the vinaigrette into the bottom of each plate.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Serve the asparagus by picking up a piece with your hands, stirring it with the vinaigrette before eating.
6. Continue stirring and consuming until reaching the tougher lower part of the stem.
7. Begin again with a new piece, adding more oil and vinegar as desired.
8. Pass finger bowls or damp towels after serving this dish.
